ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "dept_school" TEXT /* Department or school affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the researcher */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the researcher's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_expertise" (
  "expertise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expertise */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expertise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_expertise_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher worked */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_experience_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "timeline" TEXT /* Project timeline */,
  "budget" REAL /* Project budget */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., basic, applied, clinical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the outcome */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was achieved */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., publication, presentation, award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agency or sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the agency */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency or sponsor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Grant amount */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the grant */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the grant expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant associated with the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the application was decided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the collaboration */,
  "dept_school" TEXT /* Department or school involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency or sponsor involved in the communication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, meeting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)
